word: G1236 - διάγω - diágō - dee-ag'-o - Lead life

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διάγω

- Transliteration: Diago

- Phonetic: dee-ag'-o

- Definition:

1. to lead through, lead across, send across

2. to pass, to live

- Origin: from G1223 and G71

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1223 and G71; to pass time or life: - lead life living.
